<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnWikiPage/CnWikiPage.vue -->

### Props

| Name                   | Type            | Required | Default                                                                    | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ---------------------- | --------------- | -------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `article`              | `union`         |          | `null`                                                                     | The article record to render. When null/undefined the component shows its empty-state. The shape is consumer-defined; the component reads only `article[contentField]` and `article[titleField]`.               |
| `tree`                 | `Array<object>` |          | `[]`                                                                       | The (optional) sidebar tree. Each node: `{ id, [titleField], children?: [...] }`. Empty array hides the sidebar entirely.                                                                                       |
| `register`             | `string`        |          | `''`                                                                       | OpenRegister register slug. Informational at this layer (the consumer does the fetch); declared as a prop so the manifest-driven prop forwarder in CnPageRenderer surfaces it for child components / debugging. |
| `schema`               | `string`        |          | `''`                                                                       | OpenRegister schema slug. Informational at this layer — see `register` above.                                                                                                                                   |
| `contentField`         | `string`        |          | `'body'`                                                                   | Property on `article` holding the markdown body. Defaults to `'body'`.                                                                                                                                          |
| `titleField`           | `string`        |          | `'title'`                                                                  | Property on `article` holding the page title. Defaults to `'title'`.                                                                                                                                            |
| `idParam`              | `string`        |          | `'id'`                                                                     | `$route.params` key holding the article id. Informational at this layer; declared so the consumer's data store can wire the same default the validator and renderer both reference.                             |
| `sidebarSchema`        | `string`        |          | `''`                                                                       | Schema slug for the sidebar tree. When set AND `tree` is non-empty the sidebar renders. Unset suppresses the sidebar regardless of `tree` content.                                                              |
| `sidebarRegister`      | `string`        |          | `''`                                                                       | Register slug for the sidebar tree. Defaults to `register` when unset (the common case).                                                                                                                        |
| `treeField`            | `string`        |          | `'children'`                                                               | Property on each sidebar node holding its child array. Defaults to `'children'`.                                                                                                                                |
| `sidebarTitleField`    | `string`        |          | `''`                                                                       | Property on each sidebar node holding its label. Defaults to `titleField` (so `'title'` unless overridden).                                                                                                     |
| `emptyText`            | `string`        |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Article not found')`                         | Empty-state heading when `article` is null.                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `emptyDescription`     | `string`        |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'The requested article could not be found.')` | Empty-state description when `article` is null.                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `emptyBodyText`        | `string`        |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'No content')`                                | Empty-body heading when the article has no `contentField`.                                                                                                                                                      |
| `emptyBodyDescription` | `string`        |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'This article has no content yet.')`          | Empty-body description when the article has no `contentField`.                                                                                                                                                  |

### Events

| Name         | Payload | Description                                                                                                                                                |
| ------------ | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `tree-click` | —       | Emitted when a sidebar tree node is clicked. The payload is the clicked node object (the same shape the consumer placed in `tree`).                        |
| `error`      | —       | Emitted when markdown parsing throws. Rare — `marked` and the helper are defensive — but the contract is explicit so consumers can log / surface a banner. |

### Slots

| Name      | Bindings           | Description |
| --------- | ------------------ | ----------- |
| `sidebar` | `tree`, `on-click` | sidebar     |
| `header`  | `title`, `article` | header      |
| `empty`   | —                  | empty       |
| `body`    | `article`, `html`  | body        |
